chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1610 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of CMA No.8033/2025. 2. For hearing of main case. 29.04.2025 Mr. Sufiyan Zaman, advocate for the petitioner. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Tariq Aziz, Assistant Collector, MCC Appraisement SAPT. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate files Vakalatnama on behalf of the respondents No.2 and 3, which is taken on record. In response to previous order, learned counsel for the respondent department has placed a show cause notice on record. He states that the controversy in this petition is encapsulated in the show cause notice and the same is to be adjudicated per statutory hierarchy. Learned counsel for the petitioner states that the petitioner shall contest the notice before the issuing authority, however, seeks the same to be decided vide a speaking order, after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioner and no coercive action be taken against the petitioner pending the aforesaid. Learned counsel for the respondent has no cavil to the aforesaid and states that the petition may be disposed of in the said terms. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
